CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Lawrence Kayan Choy.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768.

Robert J. Sheppard, Esq. was present in pro per on behalf of himself, Robert J. Sheppard, individually and dba Sheppard, Uziel, Sussman & Rosen.
Mr. Sheppard was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Lawrence Kayan Choy.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract was filed on July 26, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Lawrence Kayan Choy took place on August 20, 2018, and was effectuated on August 31, 2018.
Default as to defendant Lawrence Kayan Choy was entered on November 15, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Robert J. Sheppard, individually and dba Sheppard, Uziel, Sussman & Rosen, and against the defaulted defendant, Lawrence Kayan Choy, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,516.63.
Attorney Fees - $5,000.00.
Costs - $580.00.
Total - $106,096.93.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Continued To Apr-24-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
